sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69341" key="murobafi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠρο-βᾰφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n69341.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dipping in perfume,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).189</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
